fuel_critical.standard: You have less than three laps of fuel left|Fuel for less than three laps, plan a stop
fuel_critical.formal: Fuel range below three laps. Plan a stop.
fuel_critical.aggressive: You are running out in three laps! Pit now

fcy_active.standard: Full course yellow, lift off|FCY on track, reduce pace
fcy_active.formal: Full course yellow active. Reduce speed.

rain_increasing.standard: Rain probability increasing|Watch out, rain may come soon

brake_wear_high.standard: Brake wear high, take care under braking|Brake wear above eighty percent
brake_wear_high.formal: Critical brake wear. Reduce braking load.
brake_wear_high.aggressive: Brakes at the limit! Careful under braking

tyre_wear_high.standard: Tyre wear high, pace dropping|Tyres are falling off, manage pace
tyre_wear_high.aggressive: Tyres are gone! Manage them now

pit_window_opened.standard: Pit window open, you can come in|Pits open, pit window has started
pit_window_opened.formal: Pit window active. Analysing optimal strategy.
pit_window_opened.aggressive: Pit window is open! Come in when ready
